stories.story: 作为运营，我希望选择一个 SKU 后系统能自动拉取其当前 Listing、5 个头部竞品 Listing、近 30 天搜索词报告、自家 + 竞品最近 50 条 Review，作为优化基础数据
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望看到当前 Listing 的 5 维度评分（百分制）+ 总分
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望看到 AI 推荐的"最关键的 3-5 个改进点"（按 ROI 排序）
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望选择 1 个改进点后，AI 给我 3 个不同风格的改写方案
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望对 AI 方案能"采纳 / 微调 / 拒绝并要求重写"
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望每完成一轮迭代后能看到新评分 + 与上一轮的对比
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望一键将优化后版本同步到亚马逊后台
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望每次改动都生成新版本（含图像），可对比、可回滚
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望对每条改动都能看到"AI 为什么这么改"的推理
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望看到当前 SKU 的优化历史记录（哪轮做了什么）
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望对主图能让 AI 生成 3 个改进版本（基于现有主图为参考）
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望生成的主图符合亚马逊主图规则（白底、无文字水印、产品占比≥85%）
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望对 A+ 模块图（信息图/对比图/场景图）能让 AI 生成
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望对生成的图能"在 X 上微调（再生成）/ 用 Y 风格再来一版"
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望对生成的图能在内置编辑器做微调（裁剪/角标/文字位置）
stories.implementation: deferred: listing adapter and scoring engine after M2/M3 loop

stories.story: 作为运营，我希望生成的图能直接同步到亚马逊（含主图触发审核流程跟踪）
